title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MBD Group - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at MBD Group - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
MBD Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About MBD Group:
MBD Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MBD Group!
